# Suilaiy Formation

**Summary**: The lowermost formation of the Thamama Group.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] characterized the suilaiy-formation as a deep-water carbonate unit.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992]] deep-water carbonate shelf

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Composed mainly of lime mudstone, wackestone, and packstone. ([[1992-al-sulami|Al-Sulami, 1992, p. 37]])
